name: Gmail Receipts and Travel Confirmations
description: A chronologically ordered list of up to 100 recent Gmail rows matching purchase receipts, flight confirmations, or ticket messages.

id.description: Unique Gmail message or thread-row identifier exposed by the authenticated mailbox.

date.description: Gmail's displayed received date or timestamp for the message row.

sender.description: Sender name, email address, or both when Gmail exposes both values.

subject.description: Subject line displayed in the Gmail search result.

snippet.description: Short preview text displayed alongside the message subject.
